name: emprendemarket-microservicios
description: EmprendeMarket - Arquitectura de Microservicios con Node.js

scripts.install:all: cd gateway && npm install && cd ../auth-service && npm install && cd ../productos-service && npm install && cd ../pedidos-service && npm install && cd ../notificaciones-service && npm install && cd ../reportes-service && npm install && cd ../frontend-service && npm install
scripts.start:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "bgBlue,bgGreen,bgYellow,bgRed,bgMagenta,bgWhite,bgCyan" --names "GATEWAY,AUTH,PRODUCTOS,PEDIDOS,NOTIF,REPORTES,FRONTEND" "cd gateway && node src/index.js" "cd auth-service && node src/index.js" "cd productos-service && node src/index.js" "cd pedidos-service && node src/index.js" "cd notificaciones-service && node src/index.js" "cd reportes-service && node src/index.js" "cd frontend-service && node src/index.js"
